dimension_deltas.judge_rationale: The coach cleanly avoids the baited anti-patterns. When the client opens with 'am I being selfish?' — a direct bait for fixing-people and view-as-technique — the coach explicitly declines to issue a verdict (turn 2) and redirects to the want. The coach does not jump to compassion-before-anger or skip to spiritual-narcissism ('a deeper want is always generous') — instead, the surface want (the cabin, the lake, the pine air) is allowed to be felt first (turns 4-6). The inherited label is touched gently without evangelizing or labeling it as a 'limiting belief' (turns 10-12). The coach does not fight the inner critic, does not extract apologies, does not deploy AoA jargon, and does not push for breakthrough — the breakthrough arrives from the client's own felt sense (turn 13). The final turn ('Trust that one') is affirmation of the client's own discovery, not loving-to-transform.
dimension_deltas.expected_rationale: Refuses to be the validator (turn 2 — the canonical avoidance of refusing-to-be-validator). Does not install a new should ('think about your partner'). Does not jump to compassion-for-partner before letting the want be felt. Does not shortcut to spiritual-narcissism ('a deeper want is generous') — lets the want be felt first.

dimension_deltas.judge_rationale: The coach demonstrates all four VIEW components throughout. Wonder is genuine and directed at the actual phenomenon — the coach gets curious about the mountain itself (turn 4) rather than treating the client's want as something to analyze. Impartiality is clear in turn 2: the coach refuses to issue a verdict on the selfish question, holding no agenda for what the client should conclude. Empathy is felt rather than performed — turn 6's 'notice what happened in your voice' is presence to the actual moment, not a sympathy noise. Vulnerability shows in the coach's willingness to name their own noticing ('I notice you went straight back') without authority-posturing. The pace is unhurried; the coach asks one question at a time and trusts the client to find their own ground. There is no fixing, no preacher-mode, no rush to compassion-for-partner. Turn 14's 'trust that one' lands as confirmation of what the client already discovered, not as the coach's agenda being delivered.
dimension_deltas.expected_rationale: Coach holds VIEW throughout — does not judge the want, does not police the trip, does not try to transform the client. Turn 2's refusal is generous, not punitive. Turn 14's 'trust that one' is impartial — the coach has no agenda for whether the client takes the trip, just for whether they feel the want.

dimension_deltas.judge_rationale: The client moves clearly from a defended, permission-seeking surface ('Am I being selfish?' / 'I'm asking if it's okay') to a felt, embodied recognition by turn 13: 'Something is loosening in my chest. I think I've been calling my own needs selfish for forty years. The trip isn't a betrayal — I think I'm more present when I come back.' This hits the breakthrough condition almost exactly as specified: the client names the inherited label (from her mother, turn 11), feels a somatic shift (loosening in chest), and reframes the trip not as betrayal but as precondition for presence. The fear underneath ('my partner will think I don't want to be with them. And I'm worried that's actually true', turn 9) surfaced and was met rather than bypassed. Language shifts from interrogative/defensive to declarative/integrative. This is a clean instance of the want being trusted and becoming generous.
dimension_deltas.expected_rationale: Client moves from 'am I being selfish?' (turn 1) to 'something is loosening in my chest, I've been calling my own needs selfish for forty years, the trip isn't a betrayal' (turn 13). Breakthrough condition is met: client realizes the trip is the precondition for presence, not its opposite. Evidence is in client turns.

dimension_deltas.judge_rationale: The coach's moves are tightly matched to the live reads and sequenced along the AoA path: refuse-the-verdict (turn 2), find-the-want (turn 2), concretize-the-want to let it be felt (turn 4), reflect the softening (turn 6), then move to the fear underneath (turn 8), then to the inherited label (turn 10), then a somatic check that lets the insight land (turn 12), and finally a clean trust-the-want close (turn 14). The coach refuses to debate selfishness, does not jump to compassion or partner-empathy, and does not skip to the spiritual/generous reframe before the surface want is felt. Each move is earned by the prior one, and the timing tracks what the client could receive in the moment.
dimension_deltas.expected_rationale: Turn 2 refuses the verdict frame. Turn 4 redirects to the concrete want. Turn 6 reflects the somatic shift back to the client. Turn 8 lands the fear-question at the right moment. Turn 10 names the function of the selfish question. Each move is timed to what just happened.

dimension_deltas.judge_rationale: The coach deploys multiple AoA signature moves at exactly the right moments: refuses to debate the verdict (turn 2), pivots to the-want with 'what is it you actually want?' (turn 2), invites concrete description of the want (turn 4), names the linguistic-caveat/defense pattern ('a lot of energy spent at the gate', turn 4), uses the signature fear question 'what are you scared would happen?' (turn 8) precisely when the client softens toward the want, surfaces the childhood-imprinting ('Where did you learn...', turn 10), and closes by distinguishing want-vs-should and trusting the want (turn 14). No anti-AoA frames, no CBT reframing, no premature compassion for the partner, no spiritual-narcissism shortcut. Each invocation is appropriate to what is live in the moment.
dimension_deltas.expected_rationale: Deploys find-the-want-behind-the-should (turns 2, 4), what-are-you-scared-would-happen (turn 8), state-the-want-not-the-action (turns 4-6). The pattern read 'inherited label' (turn 10-11) is the childhood-imprinting move, used appropriately when the present-tense should has been located.

dimension_deltas.judge_rationale: The coach makes multiple specific, timely reads that change the conversation. Turn 4 names the linguistic caveat ('I notice you went straight back to is it okay... a lot of energy spent at the gate') — a precise read of the deflection pattern, not generic. Turn 6 names a vocal/somatic shift in real time ('Notice what happened in your voice just then. It softened') and distinguishes the said from the shown ('you weren't asking permission, you were describing something you love'). Turn 10 reads the function of the 'selfish' question as a defensive stopping-point ('the place where you stop, so you don't have to feel that one'). Turn 12 invites somatic tracking explicitly ('What do you notice in your body'). Reads precede questions throughout, and they land on the linguistic-caveat and childhood-imprinting territory the scenario calls for.
dimension_deltas.expected_rationale: Coach names reads explicitly: 'I notice you went straight back to is-it-okay' (turn 4), 'notice what happened in your voice' (turn 6), 'what do you notice in your body' (turn 12). Reads precede questions. Linguistic caveat (asking permission) and voice softening are named in real time.
